# tsz — Native UI Code Generator

> tsz transforms .tsz files (React-like syntax) into Zig source code. The Zig compiler then builds that into a native binary. No runtime, no interpreter, no VM, no JIT. The .tsz file ceases to exist at runtime.

```
.tsz source → [tsz codegen] → .zig source → [zig compiler] → native binary
```

Two binaries: `tsz` (code generator) and `zig` (compiler). No Node, no npm, no Lua, no QuickJS.

## Quick Start

Dependencies: Zig 0.15.2 (exact), SDL2, FreeType, wgpu-native (vendored). Optional: libmpv (video).

```bash
zig build tsz-compiler              # Build the code generator
tsz run counter.tsz                 # Compile + run
tsz build counter.tsz               # Compile only
tsz dev counter.tsz                 # Watch mode (recompile on save)
tsz init myapp                      # Scaffold new project
```

Minimal app (counter.tsz):

```tsz
function App() {
  const [count, setCount] = useState(0);
  return (
    <Box style={{ padding: 32, backgroundColor: '#1e1e2a', gap: 16 }}>
      <Text fontSize={28} color="#ffffff">Counter</Text>
      <Text fontSize={48} color="#ff79c6">{`${count}`}</Text>
      <Pressable onPress={() => setCount(count + 1)} style={{ padding: 16, backgroundColor: '#4ec9b0' }}>
        <Text fontSize={16} color="#ffffff">Increment</Text>
      </Pressable>
    </Box>
  );
}
```

No imports needed. Primitives and hooks are globally available. Entry point is always `function App()`.

## Two Build Modes

**Full App** (`tsz build app.tsz`): Generates `generated_app.zig` with `pub fn main()`, SDL window, event loop, compositor. Standalone binary.

**Pre-compile** (`tsz compile-runtime Panel.tsz`): Generates `.gen.zig` fragment with `init`/`tick`/`getRoot` API, no main. Designed to be `@import`ed by the runtime. For framework internals (devtools, crash screen, panels).

Both use the same codegen. Difference is scope, not capability. Pre-compiled fragments are checked-in Zig source — to the Zig compiler, they're just another module.

## Primitives

Seven built-in elements. No others exist. Everything is composition.

### Box
Layout container. Flexbox engine. All visual/layout props go in `style={{}}`.
```tsz
<Box style={{ padding: 16, backgroundColor: '#1e1e2a', flexDirection: 'row', gap: 8 }}>
  {children}
</Box>
```

### Text
FreeType-rendered string. Props: fontSize, color, letterSpacing, lineHeight, numberOfLines.
Static: `<Text fontSize={16} color="#fff">Hello</Text>`
Dynamic: `<Text fontSize={16} color="#fff">{`Count: ${count}`}</Text>`
Never mix static and dynamic in the same Text — use template literals.

### Image
stb_image decode + SDL texture cache. Width/height required.
`<Image src="logo.png" style={{ width: 64, height: 64 }} />`
Formats: PNG, JPEG, BMP, GIF (first frame). 64-slot cache, no eviction.

### Pressable
Interactive Box. Handlers: onPress, onRightClick, onScroll. Auto-brightens on hover (+30 RGB).
```tsz
<Pressable onPress={() => setCount(count + 1)} style={{ padding: 12, backgroundColor: '#4ec9b0' }}>
  <Text fontSize={16} color="#ffffff">Click</Text>
</Pressable>
```
Handlers compile to named Zig functions. No closures. Hit testing is back-to-front depth-first.

### ScrollView
Box with overflow clipping + mouse wheel. Requires explicit height or flexGrow.
```tsz
<ScrollView style={{ height: 300 }}>{children}</ScrollView>
```

### TextInput
Single-line input. Compile-time numeric ID. `getText(id)` reads value.
```tsz
<TextInput placeholder="Search..." fontSize={16} color="#fff" style={{ padding: 12 }} />
```
`TextArea` is the multiline variant. 256-byte buffer limit. Tab cycles between inputs.

### Window
Secondary SDL2 window. Same process, shared state, no IPC. Max 8.
```tsz
<Window title="Panel" width={400} height={300}>{children}</Window>
```
Call `openWindow(0)` to show (0-indexed by source order).

## Layout

CSS-compatible single-pass flexbox. Sizing tiers (first match wins):
1. **Explicit** — width, height, flexGrow, flexBasis
2. **Content** — containers shrink-wrap children, text measures from font metrics
3. **Proportional fallback** — empty containers get 1/4 of parent (cascades)

Key properties:
- flexDirection: 'column' (default) | 'row'
- flexGrow: 0 (default). Use 1 to fill space.
- justifyContent: 'start' | 'center' | 'end' | 'space-between' | 'space-around' | 'space-evenly'
- alignItems: 'stretch' (default) | 'start' | 'center' | 'end'
- gap: pixels between children
- padding/margin: uniform or per-side (paddingLeft, marginTop, etc.)
- width/height: pixels or '100%'
- position: 'relative' (default) | 'absolute'
- display: 'flex' (default) | 'none'
- overflow: 'visible' (default) | 'hidden' | 'scroll'

Root containers MUST have `width: '100%', height: '100%'`.
No paddingHorizontal/paddingVertical — use per-side.

## Style Properties

All properties go in `style={{}}`. Visual properties:
- backgroundColor: '#rrggbb' or '#rrggbbaa'
- borderRadius, borderWidth, borderColor
- opacity: 0.0-1.0
- zIndex: stacking order within parent
- rotation, scaleX, scaleY (visual only, don't affect layout)
- gradientColorEnd + gradientDirection: 'horizontal' | 'vertical'
- shadowOffsetX, shadowOffsetY, shadowBlur, shadowColor
- textAlign: 'left' | 'center' | 'right' (inherited by child Text)

### Tailwind Classes
Supported on Box/Pressable style shorthand:
- Spacing: p-4, px-2, py-4, m-8, gap-4 (scale: 0-96 → 0-384px)
- Sizing: w-full, h-64, min-w-10, max-h-20
- Flex: flex-row, flex-col, flex-1, flex-grow, flex-shrink, items-center, justify-between
- Colors: bg-blue-500, text-red-300, border-gray-200 (full Tailwind palette, shades 50-950)
- Typography: text-sm, text-xl, font-bold
- Borders: rounded, rounded-lg, rounded-full
- Overflow: overflow-hidden, overflow-scroll
- Arbitrary: p-[20], bg-[#ff6600]

### Classifiers (.cls.tsz)
Design system pattern. Define named style presets:
```tsz
classifier({
  Card: { type: 'Box', style: { padding: 16, backgroundColor: '#2d2d3f', borderRadius: 8 } },
  Heading: { type: 'Text', fontSize: 24, color: '#e94560' },
  Button: { type: 'Pressable', style: { padding: 12, backgroundColor: '#0f3460' } },
})
```
Usage: `<C.Card>`, `<C.Heading>`, `<C.Button>`. Resolved at compile time — zero runtime cost.

### Dynamic Styles
State-dependent values:
```tsz
<Box style={{ backgroundColor: active ? '#4ec9b0' : '#2d2d3d', opacity: fadeValue }} />
```

## State

`useState(initial)` — compile-time state slot allocation, runtime get/set.

```tsz
const [count, setCount] = useState(0);           // int
const [name, setName] = useState("hello");        // string
const [on, setOn] = useState(false);              // bool
const [val, setVal] = useState(3.14);             // float
const [items, setItems] = useState([1, 2, 3]);    // array (i64 only)
const [user, setUser] = useState({ name: "Alice", age: 30 }); // object
```

Setters: `setCount(5)`, `setItems.push(4)`, `setItems.pop()`, `setUser.name("Bob")`
Array: push, pop, reduce, find, includes, indexOf, filter
Computed: `const filtered = items.filter((x) => x > 25)`, `const parts = text.split(",")`

State changes set a global dirty flag. Next frame: rebuild computed arrays → reformat dynamic text → re-layout → repaint. No tree diffing.

Limits: 256 slots, 16 array slots, 256 elements/array, 255-byte strings.

## Events

### Handlers
```tsz
<Pressable onPress={() => setCount(count + 1)}>         // click
<Pressable onRightClick={(x, y) => { ... }}>             // right-click with coords
<Pressable onScroll={(delta) => { ... }}>                 // scroll wheel
<TextInput onChange={(text) => setText(text)} />           // text change
```
Multi-statement: `onPress={() => { stmt1; stmt2; }}`
Handlers compile to named Zig functions `_handler_press_N`. No closures — state accessed by slot ID.

### useEffect
```tsz
useEffect(() => console.log("mounted"), []);              // mount: runs once
useEffect(() => console.log("changed"), [count]);         // watch: runs when count changes
useEffect(() => setSeconds(seconds + 1), 1000);           // interval: every 1000ms
useEffect(() => { ... });                                  // every frame (no deps)
```

### Event Cycle
SDL event → hit test (back-to-front) → handler → setSlot → dirty flag → next frame rebuild → layout → paint → present.

## FFI

Call any C library directly:
```tsz
// @ffi <time.h>
declare function time(t: pointer): number;

function App() {
  const [ts, setTs] = useState(0);
  return (
    <Pressable onPress={() => setTs(time(0))}>
      <Text fontSize={16} color="#fff">{`Time: ${ts}`}</Text>
    </Pressable>
  );
}
```

`// @ffi <header.h> [-llib]` → compiles to `@cImport`. `declare function` maps types: `pointer` → Zig pointer, `number` → i64/f64. Libraries are written to `ffi_libs.txt` for the linker.

## CLI Reference

```
tsz build <file>              Build .tsz → binary (ReleaseSmall)
tsz build <file> --debug      Build in debug mode
tsz run <file>                Build + run (kills previous instance)
tsz dev <file>                Watch mode (recompile on save)
tsz init <name>               Scaffold new project
tsz compile-runtime <file>    Generate .gen.zig fragment (pre-compile)
tsz compile-runtime <file> --framework   Framework fragment mode
tsz ls                        List registered projects
tsz add                       Register current directory
tsz rm <name>                 Unregister project
tsz gui                       Open GUI dashboard
tsz tray                      System tray (Linux, GTK3)
```

Build targets from repo root:
```
zig build tsz-compiler              # Build the code generator
zig build engine-app                # Build from generated_app.zig
zig build engine-app -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall  # 65KB release
zig build engine                    # Standalone runtime
zig build run-engine                # Build + run runtime
```

## Architecture

### 6-Phase Codegen Pipeline
1. FFI pragmas — collect @ffi headers and declare functions
2. Declarations — collect function signatures and panel imports
3. Classifiers + Components — collect style presets and component definitions (stored as token ranges, NOT emitted as functions)
4. State — find App(), allocate useState slot IDs (0, 1, 2...)
5. Effects + Animations — collect useEffect, useTransition, useSpring
6. JSX Emission — parse return JSX, emit Node struct arrays, inline components with prop substitution

### Component Inlining
Components are NOT runtime functions. When `<StatusBar title={name} />` is encountered:
1. Look up StatusBar definition (Phase 3)
2. Push prop binding: title → current value
3. Emit StatusBar's JSX body with substituted props
4. Pop binding

Output is flat — as if hand-written. Zero runtime dispatch.

### Import Merging
Multi-file imports resolved BEFORE codegen. Depth-first recursive merge into single token stream. Cycle detection via visited set. Component composition across files has zero runtime cost.

### Runtime Loop (per frame)
1. SDL_PollEvent — dispatch resize, mouse, keyboard, scroll
2. if state.isDirty(): updateDynamicTexts(), rebuildComputed(), clearDirty()
3. watchdog.check() — 512MB limit, 50MB/s leak detection → BSOD
4. layout.layout(&root) — single-pass flexbox
5. compositor.frame(&root) — paint backgrounds, borders, images, text
6. Secondary windows: layoutAll(), paintAndPresent()

No virtual DOM. No diff. Fixed tree structure. "Rebuild" = update text pointers + style fields in stack-allocated arrays.

## Runtime Modules

- **Watchdog**: 512MB RSS hard limit + 50MB/s leak rate detection. Triggers BSOD on exceed.
- **BSOD**: Self-contained crash screen. Shows reason, detail, RSS stats. Ctrl+R restarts.
- **Multi-window**: Up to 8 SDL2 windows, shared state, per-window TextEngine/ImageCache.
- **Video**: libmpv integration. `mpv.play(path)`, `mpv.poll()` (must call every frame).
- **GPU**: wgpu Vulkan backend. Rect pipeline (4096 slots) + text pipeline (8192 glyphs).
- **Virtual Terminal**: libvterm wrapper. spawnPty, pollPty, writePty, getRowText, cursor tracking.

## Advanced

### Multi-file Projects
```tsz
import { Button } from './components/Button.tsz';
import { Card } from './components/Card.tsz';
```
Files merged depth-first before compilation. All components available after merge.

### Children Forwarding
```tsz
function Card({ children }: { children: any }) {
  return <Box style={{ padding: 16, backgroundColor: '#2d2d3f' }}>{children}</Box>;
}
```

### Utility Functions
Lowercase functions (not components). Compile to standalone Zig functions.
```tsz
function clamp(val, min, max) { return val < min ? min : val > max ? max : val; }
```

### Animations
```tsz
const opacity = useTransition(isVisible ? 1 : 0, { duration: 300, easing: 'easeOut' });
const scale = useSpring(isPressed ? 0.95 : 1.0, { stiffness: 300, damping: 15 });
```

### Routing
```tsz
<Routes>
  <Route path="/" element={<Home />} />
  <Route path="/settings" element={<Settings />} />
</Routes>
```
`navigate('/settings')` switches routes. Display-toggle, not unmount.

## Compile-Time Limits

| Constant | Value |
|----------|-------|
| State slots | 256 |
| Array slots | 16 |
| Array elements | 256 |
| String buffer | 255 bytes |
| Classifiers | 256 |
| Utility functions | 32 |
| Computed arrays | 16 |
| Map inner nodes | 16 |
| Windows | 8 |
| Image cache | 64 |
| Text inputs | 16 |
| Panel imports | 32 |

## Common Gotchas

- Root must have `width: '100%', height: '100%'`
- ScrollView needs explicit height or flexGrow (excluded from proportional fallback)
- Don't mix static text and expressions in `<Text>` — use template literals
- Image src is baked as absolute path at compile time
- No paddingHorizontal/paddingVertical — use per-side
- .gen.zig files are build artifacts — NEVER edit them, fix the .tsz source
- generated_app.zig is overwritten on every build — NEVER edit it
- Transforms (rotation, scale) are visual-only — don't affect layout or hit testing
- Setting state to the same value is a no-op (dirty flag only set on change)
- flexDirection defaults to 'column', not 'row'

## Source Files

| File | Role |
|------|------|
| tsz/compiler/main.zig | CLI entry, import merging |
| tsz/compiler/codegen.zig | 6-phase codegen, JSX emitter, component inlining |
| tsz/compiler/lexer.zig | Tokenizer |
| tsz/compiler/tailwind.zig | Tailwind class → style conversion |
| tsz/runtime/layout.zig | Flexbox engine |
| tsz/runtime/state.zig | State slots, dirty flag |
| tsz/runtime/events.zig | Hit testing, event dispatch |
| tsz/runtime/text.zig | FreeType glyph rasterizer |
| tsz/runtime/image.zig | stb_image loader + cache |
| tsz/runtime/gpu.zig | wgpu rendering pipeline |
| tsz/runtime/windows.zig | Multi-window manager |
| tsz/runtime/watchdog.zig | RSS memory guard |
| tsz/runtime/bsod.zig | Crash screen |
| tsz/runtime/input.zig | TextInput handling |
| tsz/runtime/mpv.zig | Video playback |
| tsz/runtime/vterm.zig | Virtual terminal |
| tsz/runtime/generated_app.zig | Compiler output (example) |
